response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC of 0.43 is below our conservative sharing threshold of 0.6, and our belief that all geographic neighbors are in persistent deficit means accepting your request would compromise our own reserve adequacy and collective resilience.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: All geographic neighbors are in persistent energy deficit; r3c4 must halt outbound sharing and focus entirely on charging to 60% SoC before resuming any coordination..
